positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a mystical forest clearing at dawn. Central composition featuring a glowing, ethereal stag amidst bioluminescent flora. The mood is enchanting and serene, utilizing a deep color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, and gold accents. Stylized illustration style, clean vector lines, intricate linework, high contrast silhouette against soft, volumetric backlighting. Designed to look excellent printed on apparel, with clear, bold shapes and excellent separation of elements. Flat lay composition, graphic design aesthetics.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photorealism, complex background clutter
